title: ItineraryElement
description: A component of an aviation itinerary such as a flight segment, ground transport leg, or ancillary service.

elementType.description: Type of itinerary element (FLIGHT, GROUND_TRANSPORT, ANCILLARY)

segmentRef.description: Reference to a flight segment if this is a flight element

legRef.description: Reference to a transport leg if this is a surface element

sequence.description: Sequential order of this element within the itinerary

id.description: Unique identifier for the contract item
